headline: EOG Resources to Present at Upcoming Conference
summary: EOG Resources, Inc. (EOG) is scheduled to present at the J.P. Morgan Energy, Power, Renewables and Mining Conference at 7:35 a.m. Central time (8:35 a.m. Eastern time) on Tuesday, June 23. Jeffrey R. Leitzell, Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, will present on behalf of EOG.

headline: EOG Resources Stock: Is EOG Underperforming the Energy Sector?
summary: Despite EOG Resources’ underperformance relative to the energy sector over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.
